name: stackcanvas-telemetry-worker
description: Collector for stackcanvas's opt-in product telemetry. Deliberately NOT part of the pnpm workspace or the published stackcanvas npm package — this is a standalone Cloudflare Worker with its own dependency graph, installed/tested with plain npm. See docs/SPEC.md "Telemetry, CI matrix, release & registry engineering" chapter and TELEMETRY.md at the repo root.
